zh.lifeSummary: 當Magdalena Armyne於1574年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，她的父親Bartholomew Arrmyne33歲，母親Mary Sutton44歲。她於1586年與John Francis Cave在英國萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magdalena Armyne于1574年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Bartholomew Arrmyne33岁，母亲Mary Sutton44岁。她于1586年与John Francis Cave在英国萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

variants.name: Magdalene
meanings: New Testament: byname of Mary Magdalene. See Madeleine .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Magdalena Armyne was born in 1574, in Leicestershire, England, her father, Bartholomew Arrmyne, was 33 and her mother, Mary Sutton, was 44. She married John Francis Cave in 1586, in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magdalena Armyne est née en 1574, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Bartholomew Arrmyne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mary Sutton, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé John Francis Cave en 1586, à Pickwell, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magdalena Armyne 1574 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bartholomew Arrmyne 33 und ihre Mutter Mary Sutton 44. Sie hat 1586 in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England John Francis Cave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magdalena Armyne è nata il nel 1574 nel Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Bartholomew Arrmyne, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Mary Sutton, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato John Francis Cave nel 1586, nel Pickwell, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Magdalena Armyneが1574年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Bartholomew Arrmyneは33歳，母Mary Suttonは44歳であった。1586年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアピックウエルでJohn Francis Caveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Magdalena Armyne(이)가 1574년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew Arrmyne(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Sutton(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1586년 영국 레이스스터실르 피ck웰에서 John Francis Cave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magdalena Armyne nasceu em 1574, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bartholomew Arrmyne, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mary Sutton, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com John Francis Cave em 1586, em Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magdalena Armyne родилась в 1574 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Bartholomew Arrmyne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Sutton, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Francis Cave в 1586 г. в местности пикквелл, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magdalena Armyne nació en 1574, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Bartholomew Arrmyne, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mary Sutton, tenía 44 años. Se casó con John Francis Cave en 1586, en Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija.
